item.description:
Location:
Description:

An Electrical Technical Officer (ETO) is sought for a CHEMICAL/OIL TANKER. The contract duration is 2 months on/off, with joining as soon as possible. The monthly salary offered is 5000 EURO. Candidates must possess an EU passport or Schengen visa. Further details are available at the office.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] ETO Job on Chemical/Oil Tanker at Stan Shipping Agency Ltd

item.description:
Location: Falmouth
Description:

A Marine Electrician position is available in Falmouth. This role is part of a recruitment drive for specialist industries. Further details and other opportunities can be found on the company's website.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Marine Electrician Job - Falmouth at Broadreach Group

item.description:
Location: Scotland
Description:

Experienced GWO Electrical Technicians are sought for offshore/onshore wind projects in Scotland. The role involves performing high-quality inspection and repair activities, adhering to industry standards and safety protocols. This position requires a strong background in electrical maintenance within the renewable energy sector.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] GWO Electrical Technician Job - Offshore Wind at BMC Recruitment Group

item.description:
Location:
Description:

An AC Mechanic with mandatory experience on offshore barges or marine vessels is required. The role involves maintenance and troubleshooting of marine/offshore HVAC systems. Interviews are scheduled in Kochi, Chennai, and Mumbai in July. Rotation is 150 days on and 43 days off.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] AC Mechanic Job on Offshore Vessels at Expo Universe

item.description:
Location: Netherlands
Description:

📍 Location: Netherlands, Belgium, Gewrmany – several projects
📅 Start Date: several dates
📄 Contract: Dutch/Belgian/German temporary agency contract
⏳ Hours: 40 hrs/week guaranteed + possible overtime

💡 Your Tasks:

✅ Quality Planning and Assurance
✅ Inspection and Testing
✅ Non-Conformance Management
✅ Document Control
✅ Compliance and Audits
✅ Communication and Coordination

🔥 What We Offer:

🏠 Free housing (single room in shared apartment)
🚗 Company car provided (or km allowance if using own car)
✈️ First & last flight paid (rotation travel at worker’s expense)
💰 Weekly salary payments
🩺 Health insurance arranged by Wanted and deducted from your growth salary
🔄 Preferred rotation: 6 weeks work / 2 weeks home (flexible)

🦺 Bring your own safety shoes (S3 over ankle), other PPE provided by Wanted, if needed

🔎 Requirements:

✔️ 3+ years of experience in a similar role
✔️ Good understanding of English
✔️ VCA & BSN (We can help you obtain them if needed)
✔️ Driving license (Advantage)

📩 Interested? Apply now!

Countries: Belgium Germany Netherlands

Languages: English



Apply to this job
item.title: [Hot Job] QA QC – Electrical at WANTED Spijkenisse

item.description:
Location: Netherlands
Description:

📍 Location: Rotterdam, Netherlands
📅 Start Date: ASAP
📄 Contract: Dutch temporary agency contract
⏳ Hours: 40 hrs/week guaranteed + possible overtime

💡 Your Tasks:

✅ Connecting cables with HAWKE/CMP glands
✅ Disconnecting & connecting instrumentation/tubing
✅ Assembling & dismantling sensors, valves, transmitters
✅ Pulling cables & making electrical connections
✅ Occasional ironwork related to electrical installations

🔥 What We Offer:

🏠 Free housing (single room in shared apartment)
🚗 Company car provided (or km allowance if using own car)
✈️ First & last flight paid (rotation travel at worker’s expense)
💰 Weekly salary payments
🩺 Health insurance arranged by Wanted and deducted from your growth salary
🔄 Preferred rotation: 6 weeks work / 2 weeks home (flexible)

🦺 Bring your own safety shoes (S3 over ankle), other PPE provided by Wanted, if needed

🔎 Requirements:

✔️ Conversational English required
✔️ VCA & BSN (We can help you obtain them if needed)
✔️ Driving license (Advantage)

📩 Interested? Apply now!

Countries: Netherlands

Languages: English



Apply to this job
item.title: [Hot Job] E&I Electrician at WANTED Spijkenisse

item.description:
Location:
Description:

Position available for ETO to join one of our AHTS DP2 vessels. Joining date is mid-June for a duration of 10 weeks +/-2. Requirements include DP Maintenance experience.



Apply to this job

item.title: [AI Job] ETO Position on AHTS Vessel – DP Maintenance Certification Required at Orca Crew Services NL

item.description:
Location:
Description:

We are looking for ETOs to join one of our AHTS DP2 vessels. Joining is scheduled for mid-June with a duration of 10 weeks +/- 2 weeks. Requirements for ETO include DP Maintenance experience.

If interested and available, please send your CV.



Apply to this job
